codeReview.summary: The implementation recalibrates default thresholds for the hybrid gap metric (Lifecycle convergence and Resolution velocity) and adds canonical lifecycle coverage that asserts Germination → Assimilation → Completion, monotonic gap reduction, resolution detection, and non-oscillation under defaults. This aligns with the feature description and the assigned fulfills assertions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker lint step checks only production code and can miss test-only warnings; the worker explicitly identified this mismatch.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/rust-library-worker/SKILL.md:62 uses `cargo clippy -p sd-core -- -D warnings`; handoff 2026-03-10T16-36-43-303Z__sdcore-threshold-recalibration__256f6243-b39b-46f1-84aa-4cfc11cd5af8.json:89 recommends `cargo clippy -p sd-core --tests -- -D warnings`.

summary: Pass: default thresholds were recalibrated for the new hybrid metric and the canonical scenario assertions were added; no blocking code issues were found in this feature.
